segments.text: Thank you for calling the Tourist Line.
segments.translation: 欢迎致电“旅游专线”。

segments.text: There are many different ways of getting round the city and we'd like to suggest some you may not have thought of.
segments.translation: 游览全城的方式有很多种，我们来给您推荐一些您之前可能没有想过的方案。

segments.text: How about a city trip by boat?
segments.translation: 比如乘船游览。

segments.text: There are four main stopping points from west to east: stop A Green Banks, stop B City Bridge, stop C Roman Landing and stop D Newtown.
segments.translation: 水路从西到东总共有四个停靠站：A站是绿色河岸、B站是城市大桥，C站叫罗马登陆点，D站叫新镇。

segments.text: You can find the main booking office at stop A.
segments.translation: 售票处设在A站。

segments.text: The first boat leaves at 8 a.m. and the last one at 6.30 p.m.
segments.translation: 每天最早的一班船是上午8点，最晚一班在下午6点半。

segments.text: There are also many attractions you can visit along the river.
segments.translation: 沿途有很多可以去的旅游名胜。

segments.text: At Stop A, if you have time, you can visit the fine 16th century palace here built for the king with its beautiful formal gardens.
segments.translation: 如果您时间比较充裕的话，在A站您可以去参观16世纪为国王修建的精美宫殿和法式花园。

segments.text: It's very near the booking office.
segments.translation: 那儿离售票处很近。

segments.text: Now you can enjoy every corner of this superb residence.
segments.translation: 您可以近距离感受这座奢华建筑的每一处细节。

segments.text: Stop B. Why don't you visit Tower Restaurant with its wide range of refreshments?
segments.translation: 在B站，为什么您不去塔楼餐厅享受一系列茶点？

segments.text: This is a place where you can sit and enjoy the wonderful views over the old commercial and banking centre of the city.
segments.translation: 在这儿您可以坐下来慢慢地欣赏城市老金融区和银行区的怡人景色。

segments.text: Stop C is the area where, in the first century AD, invading soldiers crossed the river; this was much shallower than it is now.C
segments.translation: 站正是公元一世纪入侵的罗马士兵渡河的地方；那时候这里的河水比现在要浅得多。

segments.text: That's why this area is called Roman Landing.
segments.translation: 罗马登陆点这个地方也因此而得名。

segments.text: There's an interactive Museum to visit here with a large shop which has a good range of local history books.
segments.translation: 这里有一座交互式的博物馆您可以去看看，博物馆里还有一个很大的商店，里面可以买到琳琅满目的讲述本地历史的书籍。

segments.text: At the furthest point of the trip, stop D, the most exciting place to visit is the new Entertainment Complex with seven-screen cinema, bowling alley and video games arcade.
segments.translation: 在旅行的最后一站D站，最值得去看的是新落成的娱乐中心；那里有带7块银幕的电影院、保龄球馆和电子游戏厅等等。

segments.text: Besides the boat tours, there are city buses.
segments.translation: 除了乘船游玩，您也可以选择旅游巴士。

segments.text: Two companies offer special services: The Top Bus Company runs all its tours with a live commentary in English.
segments.translation: 有两家公司提供这样的特别服务：顶级巴士公司的所有线路都带英文的现场解说。

segments.text: Tours leave from 8.30 a.m. every 20 minutes.
segments.translation: 大巴每天从早上8点半开始，每20分钟发一趟。

segments.text: There are departures from Central Station, Castle Hill and Long Walk.
segments.translation: 首发站有中央车站、城堡山丘和步行长路。

segments.text: This is a hop-on hop-off service and tickets are valid for 24 hours.
segments.translation: 你可以在途中随时上下车，车票24小时内有效。

segments.text: For further details call Top Bus on 0208 9447810.
segments.translation: 如果想了解更多信息的话请垂询顶级巴士公司电话：0208 9447810。

segments.text: The Number One Sightseeing Tour is available with a commentary in eight languages.
segments.translation: 另外一家叫第一观光旅游的公司提供八种语言的讲解。

segments.text: Buses depart from Central Station every five to six minutes from about 9 a.m. with the last bus at around 7 p.m.
segments.translation: 巴士从中央车站发车，从早上9点到下午7点每隔五六分钟发一班。

segments.text: There are also Number One services with an English-speaking ...
segments.translation: 第一观光旅游公司还提供英文的...
